mapper.select: SELECT S.SESSION_ID, S.SESSION_TITLE, S.TOTAL_QUESTIONS, Q.SESSION_QUESTION_ID, Q.QUESTION_ORDER, Q.QUESTION_TEXT FROM INTERVIEW_SESSION S INNER JOIN SESSION_QUESTION Q ON S.SESSION_ID = Q.SESSION_ID WHERE S.SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} ORDER BY Q.QUESTION_ORDER ASC

SELECT SESSION_ID AS sessionId, SESSION_TITLE AS sessionTitle, TOTAL_QUESTIONS AS totalQuestions, COMPLETED_AT AS completedAt FROM INTERVIEW_SESSION WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND SESSION_STATUS = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY COMPLETED_AT DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INTERVIEW_SESSION WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND SESSION_STATUS = 'COMPLETED'
mapper.update: UPDATE INTERVIEW_SESSION SET SESSION_STATUS = 'COMPLETED', COMPLETED_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_BY = CAST(#{sessionId} AS CHAR) WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId}
